metadata.name: Public / Government Tree
metadata.purpose: External TreeView data source for the Economy / Comparator / Business Simulation master interface.
metadata.schema_backbone: Flat node_id / parent_id records compatible with taxonomy_seed_v0_1 and the completed sector trees.
source_notes: Built from prompts/prompt_4_public_government_tree.md in the Public / Government TreeView Build Prep Package v0.1.
Uses completed Human / Consumer, Business / Commercial, Market / Exchange, and Finance / Capital trees as schema and viewpoint references only.
Synthesized v0.1 taxonomy; no separate legacy Public / Government taxonomy was supplied.
metadata.relationship_to_consumer_tree: Human / Consumer is a reference viewpoint for personal public services, benefits, identity, records, taxes, rights, and complaints, but its product/value taxonomy is not copied.
metadata.relationship_to_business_tree: Business / Commercial is linked through registration, licensing, permits, inspections, public procurement, grants, taxation, employer obligations, and compliance, but the business operations tree is not copied.
metadata.relationship_to_market_tree: Market / Exchange is linked through procurement markets, regulated market rules, consumer protection, competition, disputes, and settlement authority, but marketplace taxonomy is not copied.
metadata.relationship_to_finance_tree: Finance / Capital is linked through taxation, public debt, grants, benefits, financial regulation, payments, public records, and obligations, but financial instruments are not copied.

nodes.label: Public / Government
